journal_page: No page numbers are provided in the citation. Many online-only articles or those with DOI-based citations omit page numbers. This is not an indication of inauthenticity, but the component is absent.

pmcid: No PMC ID is provided in the citation. This is not required for authenticity, as many articles are not deposited in PubMed Central immediately.

authors: The listed authors are real researchers in viral genomics, epidemiology, and phylogenetics. Baele, Pybus, Rambaut, Aanensen, and Kraemer are well-known in the field. title: The title is entirely missing from the citation. This is a significant formatting error. For citation authenticity and citation tracking, the title is essential. journal_issue: Science volume 373, issue 6557 corresponds to a 2021 issue. This is consistent with the publication year of 2021. Science's volume numbering is sequential and well-documented.
